lyrics.text: 머지않아 나도 보여줘야겠어
lyrics.romanization: Meojianha nado boyeojwoyagesseo
lyrics.translate: It won't be long, I'll have to show 'em too

lyrics.text: 어딜 가나 내가 들릴 거야, 계속
lyrics.romanization: Eodil gana naega deullil geoya, gyesok
lyrics.translate: You'll be hearing me everywhere you go, non-stop

lyrics.text: 멀지 않아, 벽돌 같은 paper를 쌓아 (쌓아), 쌓아 (쌓아), 쌓아
lyrics.romanization: Meolji anha, byeokdol gateun paper-reul ssaha (ssaha), ssaha (ssaha), ssaha
lyrics.translate: Not far now, stacking paper like bricks (stack it), stack it (stack it), stack it

lyrics.text: 난 쓸어 담을 거야, 싹 (싹), 싹 (싹), 싹
lyrics.romanization: Nan sseureo dameul geoya, ssak (ssak), ssak (ssak), ssak
lyrics.translate: I'm gonna sweep it all up, clean (clean), clean (clean), clean

lyrics.text: 채워버릴 거야, 꽉 (꽉), 꽉, 꽉
lyrics.romanization: Chaewobeoril geoya, kkwak (kkwak), kkwak, kkwak
lyrics.translate: Gonna fill it all up, tight (tight), tight, tight

lyrics.text: All the haters gonna stop, stop
고개 부러질 때까지
lyrics.romanization: Gogae bureojil ttaekkaji
lyrics.translate: Until they break their necks looking

lyrics.text: Yeah, I'mma stack it like a layer
꽉 채워 나가야지, 인생을 맞춰, for the bag
lyrics.romanization: Kkwak chaewo nagayaji, insaengeul matchwo, for the bag
lyrics.translate: Gotta fill it up tight, betting my life on the line for the bag

lyrics.text: 언젠간 증명해 내 다짐, 난 꼭 말할 거야, 해냈어
lyrics.romanization: Eonjengan jeungmyeonghae nae dajim, nan kkok malhal geoya, haenaesseo
lyrics.translate: Someday I'll prove my resolve, I'm definitely gonna say, 'I made it'

lyrics.text: Life is beautiful and my 핸드폰엔 연락들이
lyrics.romanization: Life is beautiful and my haendeuponen yeollakdeuri
lyrics.translate: Life is beautiful and my phone is flooded with calls

lyrics.text: Sweet as candy corn
Got a bad shorty on me, 돌덩어리 on my neck
lyrics.romanization: Got a bad shorty on me, doldeongeori on my neck
lyrics.translate: Got a bad shorty on me, heavy rocks on my neck

lyrics.text: 요즘 따라 아픈 허리, 내 몸마저 like a check
lyrics.romanization: Yojeum ttara apeun heori, nae mommajeo like a check
lyrics.translate: My back's been hurting lately, even my body feels like a check

lyrics.text: 머릿속은 오직 빨리, 겉은 여유 부리네
lyrics.romanization: Meoritsogeun ojik ppalli, geoteun yeoyu burine
lyrics.translate: My mind only screams 'faster', but I play it cool on the outside

lyrics.text: 다시 달려 가져
lyrics.romanization: Dasi dallyeo gajyeo
lyrics.translate: Run again and go get it

lyrics.text: 난 다시 달려 가져
lyrics.romanization: Nan dasi dallyeo gajyeo
lyrics.translate: I'll run again and go get it

lyrics.text: 또 다시 달려 가져
lyrics.romanization: Tto dasi dallyeo gajyeo
lyrics.translate: Run again and go get it once more

lyrics.text: 싹, 싹, 싹, 싹, 싹 쓸어 담아, I'm a 끝장을 보는 놈
lyrics.romanization: Ssak, ssak, ssak, ssak, ssak sseureo dama, I'm a kkeutjangeul boneun nom
lyrics.translate: Clean, clean, clean, sweep it all up, I'm the type to see it to the end

lyrics.text: 나를 봐, 내 인생은 달아
lyrics.romanization: Nareul bwa, nae insaengeun dara
lyrics.translate: Look at me, my life is sweet

lyrics.text: Forever ball, 여기는 나의 놀이터
lyrics.romanization: Forever ball, yeogineun naui noriteo
lyrics.translate: Forever ball, this is my playground

lyrics.text: 하나부터 열까지 난 성실하게 gotta glow up
lyrics.romanization: Hanabuteo yeolkkaji nan seongsilhage gotta glow up
lyrics.translate: From one to ten, I work diligently, gotta glow up

lyrics.text: Yeah, yeah
Stack up my money, brand-new
Where is my money at? 통장에 전해 bless you
lyrics.romanization: Where is my money at? Tongjange jeonhae bless you
lyrics.translate: Where is my money at? Tell my bank account 'bless you'

lyrics.text: Best of trendy in this game, 내가 어떻게 lose
lyrics.romanization: Best of trendy in this game, naega eotteoke lose
lyrics.translate: Best of trendy in this game, how could I lose

lyrics.text: 알 리 없지 내 기분, doubters watching bad news
lyrics.romanization: Al ri eopji nae gibun, doubters watching bad news
lyrics.translate: You'll never know how I feel, doubters watching bad news

lyrics.text: Had hit the bottom, 이젠 날아 world right now
lyrics.romanization: Had hit the bottom, ijen nara world right now
lyrics.translate: Had hit the bottom, now I fly around the world right now

lyrics.text: Watch me ball right now
난 쓸어 담아 right now
lyrics.romanization: Nan sseureo dama right now
lyrics.translate: I'm sweeping it all up right now

lyrics.text: 내 모든 걸 걸 right now
lyrics.romanization: Nae modeun geol geol right now
lyrics.translate: Betting everything I have right now

lyrics.text: 내 대척점 price down
lyrics.romanization: Nae daecheokjeom price down
lyrics.translate: My opposition's price is down

lyrics.text: 내 팀 아니면 pipe down
lyrics.romanization: Nae tim animyeon pipe down
lyrics.translate: If you ain't my team, pipe down

lyrics.text: Okay, Coray, 12 난 보여줘야겠어 my prime time
lyrics.romanization: Okay, Coray, 12 nan boyeojwoyagesseo my prime time
lyrics.translate: Okay, Coray, 12, I gotta show off my prime time

lyrics.text: Yeah
I'm just trying to ball
몇 백 몇 천이 문제가 아냐, I'm just ready for my goal
lyrics.romanization: Myeot baek myeot cheoni munjega anya, I'm just ready for my goal
lyrics.translate: It's not about hundreds or thousands, I'm just ready for my goal

lyrics.text: I just wanna know
정말 될 수 있는지, really wanna know
lyrics.romanization: Jeongmal doel su inneunji, really wanna know
lyrics.translate: If it's really possible, I really wanna know

lyrics.text: Yeah, yeah, yeah
머지않아 나도 보여줘야겠어
lyrics.romanization: Meojianha nado boyeojwoyagesseo
lyrics.translate: It won't be long, I'll have to show 'em too

lyrics.text: 어딜 가나 내가 들릴 거야, 계속
lyrics.romanization: Eodil gana naega deullil geoya, gyesok
lyrics.translate: You'll be hearing me everywhere you go, non-stop

lyrics.text: 멀지 않아, 벽돌 같은 paper를 쌓아 (쌓아), 쌓아 (쌓아), 쌓아
lyrics.romanization: Meolji anha, byeokdol gateun paper-reul ssaha (ssaha), ssaha (ssaha), ssaha
lyrics.translate: Not far now, stacking paper like bricks (stack it), stack it (stack it), stack it

lyrics.text: 난 쓸어 담을 거야, 싹 (싹), 싹 (싹), 싹
lyrics.romanization: Nan sseureo dameul geoya, ssak (ssak), ssak (ssak), ssak
lyrics.translate: I'm gonna sweep it all up, clean (clean), clean (clean), clean

lyrics.text: 채워버릴 거야, 꽉 (꽉), 꽉, 꽉
lyrics.romanization: Chaewobeoril geoya, kkwak (kkwak), kkwak, kkwak

lyrics.text: All the haters gonna stop, stop
고개 부러질 때까지
lyrics.romanization: Gogae bureojil ttaekkaji
lyrics.translate: Until they break their necks looking

lyrics.text: Yeah, I'mma stack it like a layer
Shine bright like a diamond, check my clarity, I'm VVVVS and flawless
Clearly see that I'm shiner more than a bald head
One thing they always said life goes on, we grow up and glow up
Just focus on what you want, wanna be, wanna do before you lost your shine (ใช่)
lyrics.romanization: Just focus on what you want, wanna be, wanna do before you lost your shine (chai)
lyrics.translate: Just focus on what you want, wanna be, wanna do before you lose your shine (yeah)

lyrics.text: 나를 보고 배워, 알았어?
lyrics.romanization: Nareul bogo baewo, arasseo?
lyrics.translate: Watch me and learn, got it?

lyrics.text: มันไม่มีไม่ดีหรอก, 알았어?
lyrics.romanization: Man mai mi mai di rok, arasseo?
lyrics.translate: There's nothing bad about it, got it?

lyrics.text: ฟังในสิ่งที่พี่บอก, 알았어?
lyrics.romanization: Fang nai sing thi phi bok, arasseo?
lyrics.translate: Listen to what I'm telling you, got it?

lyrics.text: ลองทำทุกวิธีก่อน, 알았어?
lyrics.romanization: Long tham thuk withi kon, arasseo?
lyrics.translate: Try every method first, got it?

lyrics.text: Life's too short to be shy
Be your own sunshine
It's okay if you cry, ใจเย็นๆ take your time
lyrics.romanization: It's okay if you cry, jai yen yen take your time
lyrics.translate: It's okay if you cry, take it easy and take your time

lyrics.text: Like who will know you if you don't express it?
Turning your passion into rhyme and say it
How to live in that Heaven, I be like patient
Nothing is given and you gotta earn it
송아지 골수 섭취해, on the regular
lyrics.romanization: Songaji golsu seopchihae, on the regular
lyrics.translate: Eating calf bone marrow, on the regular

lyrics.text: 아침에 서울우유도
lyrics.romanization: Achime seouruyudo
lyrics.translate: And Seoul Milk in the morning too

lyrics.text: Pick a side, either you straighten up
Or you go spin it dog
종이로 닦으면 되지, 별로 신경 없이
lyrics.romanization: Jongiro dakgeumyeon doeji, byeollo singyeong eopsi
lyrics.translate: Just wipe it with a paper towel, without caring much

lyrics.text: 구토했어, Dsquared2에도
lyrics.romanization: Gutohaesseo, Dsquared2edo
lyrics.translate: Threw up, even on my Dsquared2

lyrics.text: 무시해, 여자의 구애도
lyrics.romanization: Musihae, yeojaui guaedo
lyrics.translate: I ignore it, even a woman's advances

lyrics.text: 쟤네 authentic? More like synthetic
lyrics.romanization: Jyaene authentic? More like synthetic
lyrics.translate: Are they authentic? More like synthetic

lyrics.text: 대륙 건너서 왔어, you can go ahead
lyrics.romanization: Daeryuk geonneoseo wasseo, you can go ahead
lyrics.translate: Came across the continent, you can go ahead

lyrics.text: Drop an addy, 역시 도박꾼
lyrics.romanization: Drop an addy, yeoksi dobakkkun
lyrics.translate: Drop an addy, a gambler as expected

lyrics.text: 여기서도 나는 꾸준히 고수고
lyrics.romanization: Yeogiseodo naneun kkujunhi gosugo
lyrics.translate: Even here I'm consistently a pro

lyrics.text: 당연하게 내 판돈, 저기 털가방에 처 담았어
lyrics.romanization: Dangyeonhage nae pandon, jeogi teolgabange cheo damasseo
lyrics.translate: Naturally, I packed all my stakes in that fur bag over there

lyrics.text: Handsome, ah, 뉴욕 남자
lyrics.romanization: Handsome, ah, nyuyok namja
lyrics.translate: Handsome, ah, a New York man

lyrics.text: Drooling, ah, 뉴욕 남자
lyrics.romanization: Drooling, ah, nyuyok namja
lyrics.translate: Drooling, ah, a New York man

lyrics.text: Dead end, 갈 뻔했어, 맞아
lyrics.romanization: Dead end, gal ppeonhaesseo, maja
lyrics.translate: Almost hit a dead end, that's right

lyrics.text: 느려질래, on my walker
lyrics.romanization: Neuryeojillae, on my walker
lyrics.translate: I'll slow down, on my walker

lyrics.text: All bout me, I, 배운 게 그거라
lyrics.romanization: All bout me, I, baeun ge geugeora
lyrics.translate: All bout me, I, 'cause that's what I learned

lyrics.text: This Red E-V-I-L
That's on my brother
보이지 않는 미래에 통장을 걸어, that's how I feel
lyrics.romanization: Boiji anneun miraee tongjangeul georeo, that's how I feel
lyrics.translate: Betting my bank account on an unseen future, that's how I feel

lyrics.text: 아껴놨던 말을 해 알아가네, 뭔지 나다움이
lyrics.romanization: Akkyeonwatdeon mareul hae aragane, mwonji nadaumi
lyrics.translate: Saying the words I saved up, discovering what it means to be me

lyrics.text: 큰 거 온다고 쳐도 내지는 두 달 있다가 탕진
lyrics.romanization: Keun geo ondago chyeodo naejineun du dal itdaga tangjin
lyrics.translate: Even if a big check comes, I'd probably blow it all in two months

lyrics.text: 종 치려고 할 때쯤에 오네, 기가 막힌 타이밍
lyrics.romanization: Jong chiryeogo hal ttaejjeume one, giga makhin taiming
lyrics.translate: It comes right when I'm about to call it quits, unbelievable timing

lyrics.text: 난 연금 받고 살아, with this flow, 챙겨 이미지도
lyrics.romanization: Nan yeongeum batgo sara, with this flow, chaenggyeo imijido
lyrics.translate: I live off a pension, with this flow, keeping up my image too

lyrics.text: 실수할 수 있어, 한 두 번, we just passed it tho'
lyrics.romanization: Silsuhal su isseo, han du beon, we just passed it tho'
lyrics.translate: I might mess up once or twice, we just passed it tho'

lyrics.text: 이제 돈 쌓아 놓고 더 쌓아, baby
lyrics.romanization: Ije don ssaha noko deo ssaha, baby
lyrics.translate: Now stack the money up and stack some more, baby

lyrics.text: We got the same problem, so no dodging
Ay, 장난질 치고 있네 이 친구들, Five-lines gettin' bigger

lyrics.romanization: Deo geotjabeul su eopsi, doragado an bakkwieo gogaeneun wiro
